flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at MiraCosta College rose 33% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at MiraCosta College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($518 → $668).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at MiraCosta College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.5k → $9.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at MiraCosta College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.9% → 0.0%).
